trigger_condition: Any customer complaint received — verbal, written, or through return of goods
Critical defect (dimensional non-conformance, burst failure, label mismatch, thread defect) detected during IPC or OQC inspection
Rejection rate exceeds defined threshold — batch or shift level
severity_threshold: Rejection rate > threshold value defined in KPI001 target

trigger_condition: Major non-conformance (major NC) raised during internal audit
severity_threshold: Any Major NC as classified by lead auditor

trigger_condition: Supplier raw material (HDPE resin, masterbatch, closures) lot rejected at IQC
severity_threshold: Any IQC lot rejection; or RM rejection rate > threshold defined in KPI006 target

trigger_condition: Unplanned machine breakdown leads to production of non-conforming product or batch quality escape before detection
severity_threshold: Any confirmed quality escape linked to machine failure event

trigger_condition: Near miss event or recordable safety incident occurs on shop floor or premises
severity_threshold: Any near miss or any incident with injury / property damage

trigger_condition: Legal or regulatory non-compliance identified — environmental permit, factory act, or safety statute
severity_threshold: Any confirmed non-compliance with applicable legal requirements

trigger_condition: Management review action item not closed by agreed target date
Repeat non-conformance — same root cause or defect type reoccurs after a previously closed CAPA
severity_threshold: Same NC type reoccurring within 6 months of CAPA closure

trigger_condition: Environmental incident — spill of chemical, coolant, or lubricant; or emission / effluent exceedance
severity_threshold: Any spill reaching floor drain or outside containment; any emission reading exceeding consent limit

trigger_condition: CAPA closure rate drops below target — systemic failure to close actions on time
severity_threshold: CAPA closure rate below target defined in KPI007 for two consecutive months
